---
title: "Lab 00: Verify Your Environment + Meet Your Tools"
author: "Tania Raugewitz"
date: "2026-03-25"
format: html
---

## Step 3 Output

```{r}
Sys.getenv("LOGNAME")
R.version.string
packageVersion("rstudioapi")
print(c("tidymodels", "remotes", "sf", "terra") %in% rownames(installed.packages()))
```

## Step 5 Output

```text
traug@TLR_Suface_8 MINGW64 ~/github/ESS_523C (main)
$ git config --list --global
user.name=Tania Raugewitz
user.email=traugewitz@gmail.com
credential.https://git.bootcampcontent.com.provider=generic
http.postbuffer=524288000
filter.lfs.clean=git-lfs clean -- %f
filter.lfs.smudge=git-lfs smudge -- %f
filter.lfs.process=git-lfs filter-process
filter.lfs.required=true
```

## GitHub Profile

https://github.com/Traugewitz
